steps.expected: All fields are pre-populated and existing image + delete control are visible
steps.observed: Name=g4edit_target_cei, URI segment=g4edit_target_uri, description/keywords/order populated, Display=No, Allow Ads=No, Parent=No Parent (root), existing image preview and Delete Image button shown

steps.action: Change target category name to g4edit_target_cei_renamed and submit
steps.expected: Name updates, success flow redirects to categories grid
steps.observed: PUT succeeded; redirected to /admin/categories; grid row shows g4edit_target_cei_renamed; DB row updated

steps.action: Set parent of category 13 to g4edit_parent_cei (id=12) and submit
steps.expected: cat_parent updates and hierarchical cat_uri rebuilt
steps.observed: PUT succeeded; DB shows cat_parent=12 and cat_uri='g4edit_parent_cei/g4edit_target_uri'

assertions.title: Edit category — new image replaces old

steps.action: Upload g4edit_upload2.png on edit page and submit
steps.expected: New image persists, old image removed, DB points to new file
steps.observed: PUT succeeded; DB cat_image changed from 1773938589166_g4edit_upload1.png to 1773938751955_g4edit_upload2.png; old file removed; new file exists

steps.expected: Image file removed, DB cat_image cleared, user remains on edit form
steps.observed: DELETE succeeded; URL remained /admin/categories/13/edit; image preview/delete controls removed; DB cat_image set to empty string; file removed from disk

steps.expected: Validation error shown and record not modified
steps.observed: Inline error 'Name is required' shown; no API request sent; DB record unchanged

evidence.network: No request sent (client-side validation blocked submit)

assertions.title: Edit category — order must be integer

steps.expected: Server rejects with validation error and no persistence
steps.observed: PUT returned 400; remained on edit page; DB cat_order stayed 7

steps.action: Open edit form while category had an image
steps.expected: Image preview () and delete link/button visible
steps.observed: Image preview rendered from /uploads/categories/1773938589166_g4edit_upload1.png and Delete Image button was visible

assertions.title: Edit category — no image section when empty

steps.expected: No preview/delete control; only upload input
steps.observed: No image preview and no Delete Image button; upload input visible

frictions.description: `agent-browser network requests` returned no captured entries in this session for form actions.
frictions.resolution: Captured request methods/statuses via in-page fetch logging (sessionStorage netlog) and supplemental authenticated GET checks.

summary: Tested 9 assertions (VAL-CAT-020..028): 9 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Category edit prepopulation, parent/URI rebuild, image replace/delete, and validations behaved as expected for g4edit_ namespaced records.
